---
title: "Atomistic Insight into Ion Transport and Conductivity in Ga/Al-Substituted Li7La3Zr2O12 Solid Electrolytes"
author: ["Grace K. Dolan", "Ben Cartwright", "Mauricio R. Bonilla", "Michael J. Gidley", "Jason R. Stokes", "Gleb E. Yakubov"]
date: 2019-12-01
publication: "Carbohydrate Polymers, **208**, 97–107 (2019)."
categories: ["Rheology"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.carbpol.2018.12.052
url_preprint:
journ: "Carbohydrate Polymers"
issue: 208
page: 97-107
year: 2019
image: featured.png
pub_number: 4
---
